title: Procurement and Cooling Vendor Implications
title_translation: 对采购与散热供应商的影响

paragraphs.source: The primary vendor implication of the updated cooling architecture and doubled power density relates to CDUs and the rack-to-CDU ratio. Today, a CDU can support around 10 GB200 racks. With a rack generating about 2x the heat, that ratio would need to decline unless CDU capacity increases, implying either more CDUs or higher-capacity CDUs. We believe most major operators expect to maintain a ratio of around 10 racks per CDU. As rack power density rises, this points to larger CDUs. Today, in-row CDUs offer cooling capacities up to roughly 2 MW, but we expect future facility CDUs to reach 3-6 MW. Delta currently leads in the CDU specialist segment, alongside Schneider Electric, Vertiv, and nVent. Foxconn and Quanta dominate the system integrator category.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The primary vendor implication of the updated cooling architecture and doubled power density relates to CDUs and the rack-to-CDU ratio. Today, a CDU can support around 10 GB200 racks. With a rack generating about 2x the heat, that ratio would need to decline unless CDU capacity increases, implying either more CDUs or higher-capacity CDUs. We believe most major operators expect to maintain a ratio of around 10 racks per CDU. As rack power density rises, this points to larger CDUs. Today, in-row CDUs offer cooling capacities up to roughly 2 MW, but we expect future facility CDUs to reach 3-6 MW. Delta currently leads in the CDU specialist segment, alongside Schneider Electric, Vertiv, and nVent. Foxconn and Quanta dominate the system integrator category.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The primary vendor implication of the updated cooling architecture and doubled power density relates to CDUs and the rack-to-CDU ratio. Today, a CDU can support around 10 GB200 racks. With a rack generating about 2x the heat, that ratio would need to decline unless CDU capacity increases, implying either more CDUs or higher-capacity CDUs. We believe most major operators expect to maintain a ratio of around 10 racks per CDU. As rack power density rises, this points to larger CDUs. Today, in-row CDUs offer cooling capacities up to roughly 2 MW, but we expect future facility CDUs to reach 3-6 MW. Delta currently leads in the CDU specialist segment, alongside Schneider Electric, Vertiv, and nVent. Foxconn and Quanta dominate the system integrator category.

pro.text: 更新后的冷却架构和翻倍的功率密度对供应商的主要影响在于冷量分配单元（CDU）以及机柜与 CDU 的配比。目前，一台 CDU 约能支持 10 个 GB200 机柜。随着单机柜发热量增加约 2 倍，除非 CDU 容量提升，否则该配比将不得不下降，这意味着需要更多的 CDU 或更高容量的 CDU。我们认为大多数主要运营商希望维持每台 CDU 对应约 10 个机柜的比例。随着机柜功率密度的上升，这指向了更大容量的 CDU。目前，列间 CDU 的冷却能力最高约为 2 MW，但我们预计未来的设施级 CDU 将达到 3-6 MW。台达（Delta）目前在 CDU 专业供应商领域处于领先地位，紧随其后的是施耐德电气（Schneider Electric）、维谛（Vertiv）和稳态（nVent）。鸿海（Foxconn）和广达（Quanta）则主导了系统集成商类别。

paragraphs.source: The shift from liquid + air to 100% liquid systems, combined with higher flow rates and greater cooling capacity, will require changes across the cooling stack. Fans and radiators used in L2A CDUs will become less critical over time. That said, L2A is likely to maintain meaningful share during the current upcycle, where deployment speed matters more than full optimization, though the long-term trajectory clearly favors L2L. High-density L2L systems will also require redesigns across much of the TCS. This includes updated manifolds, larger quick disconnects (Colder Products Company, Danfoss, Staubli, Parker Hannifin), gold-plated cold plates (AVC, Delta, Boyd, CoolIT, Auras) and, very critically, larger pumps capable of delivering the required water volume.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The shift from liquid + air to 100% liquid systems, combined with higher flow rates and greater cooling capacity, will require changes across the cooling stack. Fans and radiators used in L2A CDUs will become less critical over time. That said, L2A is likely to maintain meaningful share during the current upcycle, where deployment speed matters more than full optimization, though the long-term trajectory clearly favors L2L. High-density L2L systems will also require redesigns across much of the TCS. This includes updated manifolds, larger quick disconnects (Colder Products Company, Danfoss, Staubli, Parker Hannifin), gold-plated cold plates (AVC, Delta, Boyd, CoolIT, Auras) and, very critically, larger pumps capable of delivering the required water volume. Pump sizing is directly linked to power density and the heat that must be removed. Even manufacturers of motor and drive components used in these pumps, such as Allegro MicroSystems, could see their prospects change as either larger motors, more motors, or both are required. In summary, higher heat on the TCS loop likely increases content/MW for white-space cooling vendors. QDs should benefit most, alongside manifolds and cold plates, with CDUs also benefiting, though to a lesser extent.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The shift from liquid + air to 100% liquid systems, combined with higher flow rates and greater cooling capacity, will require changes across the cooling stack. Fans and radiators used in L2A CDUs will become less critical over time. That said, L2A is likely to maintain meaningful share during the current upcycle, where deployment speed matters more than full optimization, though the long-term trajectory clearly favors L2L. High-density L2L systems will also require redesigns across much of the TCS. This includes updated manifolds, larger quick disconnects (Colder Products Company, Danfoss, Staubli, Parker Hannifin), gold-plated cold plates (AVC, Delta, Boyd, CoolIT, Auras) and, very critically, larger pumps capable of delivering the required water volume. Pump sizing is directly linked to power density and the heat that must be removed. Even manufacturers of motor and drive components used in these pumps, such as Allegro MicroSystems, could see their prospects change as either larger motors, more motors, or both are required. In summary, higher heat on the TCS loop likely increases content/MW for white-space cooling vendors. QDs should benefit most, alongside manifolds and cold plates, with CDUs also benefiting, though to a lesser extent.

pro.text: 从液冷+风冷（L2A）向 100% 全液冷系统的转变，结合更高的流量和更大的冷却能力，将要求整个冷却堆栈发生变革。随着时间的推移，L2A CDU 中使用的风扇和散热器将变得不再那么关键。尽管如此，在当前的上升周期中，部署速度比完全优化更重要，因此 L2A 可能会保持可观的市场份额，但长期趋势显然更倾向于液冷对液冷（L2L）。高密度 L2L 系统还将要求对技术冷却系统（TCS）的大部分环节进行重新设计。这包括更新的分液管（Manifolds）、更大的快速接头（Quick Disconnect (QD/MQD)）（供应商包括 Colder Products Company、丹佛斯、史陶比尔、派克汉尼汾）、镀金冷板（奇宏、台达、Boyd、CoolIT、双鸿），以及至关重要的、能够提供所需水量的更大功率泵组。

pro.text: 泵的规格直接取决于功率密度和必须排出的热量。随着需要更大功率的电机、更多的电机或两者兼而有之，甚至这些泵中使用的电机和驱动组件制造商（如 Allegro MicroSystems）的前景也可能随之改变。总之，TCS 回路中更高的热量可能会增加机房（White-space）冷却供应商在每兆瓦（MW）中的价值占比。快速接头将受益最多，其次是分液管和冷板，CDU 也会受益，但程度相对较小。

paragraphs.source: For the FWS layout, the headline implication is the potential for chiller-less designs. While we addressed this debate in a separate explanatory note for our core research and datacenter model subscribers, we reiterate that this is not entirely disruptive. Some operators are already running Blackwell systems without chillers in more AI-optimized designs, while others choose to retain chillers for workload flexibility, mixed-hall compatibility, redundancy, and reliability. Over the long term, we expect AI-optimized systems to make chillers less necessary, with content shifting from air-cooled chillers toward dry coolers or adiabatic towers. We currently estimate roughly $0.5M/MW of air-cooled chiller content versus about $0.2M/MW for dry coolers or adiabatic towers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For the FWS layout, the headline implication is the potential for chiller-less designs. While we addressed this debate in a separate explanatory note for our core research and datacenter model subscribers, we reiterate that this is not entirely disruptive. Some operators are already running Blackwell systems without chillers in more AI-optimized designs, while others choose to retain chillers for workload flexibility, mixed-hall compatibility, redundancy, and reliability. Over the long term, we expect AI-optimized systems to make chillers less necessary, with content shifting from air-cooled chillers toward dry coolers or adiabatic towers. We currently estimate roughly $0.5M/MW of air-cooled chiller content versus about $0.2M/MW for dry coolers or adiabatic towers. SPX Technologies, alongside BAC and Evapco, could benefit, while Johnson Controls, Carrier, and Trane may be challenged. Nonetheless, we expect this efficiency/flexibility trade-off to persist in the medium term and do not foresee a chiller downturn occurring overnight. [See our Industrials Model for more details.](https://semianalysis.com/industrials-model/)

pro.text: 对于设施级水系统（FWS）布局，最受关注的影响是去冷水机组（Chiller-less）设计的潜力。虽然我们在针对核心研究和数据中心模型订阅者的另一份说明中讨论过这一争议，但我们重申，这并非完全颠覆性的。一些运营商已经在更具 AI 优化特性的设计中运行不带冷水机组的 Blackwell 系统，而其他运营商则选择保留冷水机组，以保证工作负载的灵活性、混合机房的兼容性、冗余性以及可靠性。从长远来看，我们预计 AI 优化系统将降低对冷水机组的需求，价值量将从风冷冷水机组转向干冷器（Dry Coolers）或绝热冷却塔（Adiabatic Towers）。我们目前估计，风冷冷水机组的价值量约为 50 万美元/MW，而干冷器或绝热冷却塔约为 20 万美元/MW。

pro.text: SPX Technologies 以及 BAC 和 Evapco 可能会受益，而江森自控（Johnson Controls）、开利（Carrier）和特灵（Trane）可能会面临挑战。尽管如此，我们预计这种效率与灵活性之间的权衡在中期内仍将存在，并且不认为冷水机组市场会一夜之间陷入低迷。查看我们的工业模型获取更多细节。
